/usr/bin/cc -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fsanitize=address "CMakeFiles/harp-deviced.dir/device/harp-deviced.c.o" "CMakeFiles/harp-deviced.dir/device/engine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/harp-deviced.dir/device/state.c.o" "CMakeFiles/harp-deviced.dir/device/session.c.o" "CMakeFiles/harp-deviced.dir/device/panel.c.o" -o harp-deviced  libharpcore.a -lm
